synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23083 Important: Oracle Linux 10 wireshark security update
description:
[4.4.2-4.0.1.1]
- Fix post script to not fail during initial installation [Orabug: 37565359]

[1:4.4.2-4.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-130425 - Access of Uninitialized Pointer in Wireshark
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23083

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23083.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
wireshark-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
wireshark-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/wireshark-4.4.2-4.0.1.el10_1.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-13499




Description of changes:

[4.4.2-4.0.1.1]
- Fix post script to not fail during initial installation [Orabug: 37565359]

[1:4.4.2-4.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-130425 - Access of Uninitialized Pointer in Wireshark
